title: praxelis kleinioides
intro: Praxelis kleinioides, also known as smallflower praxelis, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to the Americas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Praxelis kleinioides include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Praxelis kleinioides include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
